title: GOOD: 15s connect_timeout prevents indefinite hang
description: client.rs adds connect_timeout(Duration::from_secs(15)) to the tonic Endpoint. Without it, tonic's default is no connect timeout, meaning a TCP connection to an unreachable server (SYN sent, no RST) would block the calling future indefinitely. 15s is long enough for a TLS handshake to a geographically distant server under moderate load, and short enough to fail over to the next endpoint before the caller's patience expires. The timeout is applied before the gRPC keep-alive, so it covers the initial handshake only.
